name: Warm Narrator
description: Rich, warm male baritone. Great for audiobooks and storytelling.
reference_text: The forge burns brightest at midnight. Every voice begins as raw metal, waiting for its final shape.

name: Bright Host
description: Energetic female voice with clear diction. Ideal for podcasts and explainers.
reference_text: Welcome back to Foundry Vox, where every line of copy leaves the desk sounding polished and alive.

name: Deep Anchor
description: Authoritative deep male voice. Perfect for documentaries and trailers.
reference_text: When the storm rolled across the harbor, the old station answered with a voice carved from iron and distance.

name: Gentle Reader
description: Soft, calming female voice. Suited for meditation and children's content.
reference_text: Take a slow breath and listen as the room grows quiet, the pages turning softly into evening.

name: Crisp Lecturer
description: Precise, measured delivery. Technical tutorials and presentations.
reference_text: First, verify your inputs. Then follow each step in order so the system behaves exactly as expected.

name: Velvet Evening
description: Smooth, intimate tone with a slight rasp. Late-night radio feel.
reference_text: Midnight settles over the city, and every whispered story glows a little longer in the dark.
